subject: english
description: 間接話法の疑問文では whether / if や疑問詞を使い、語順を平叙文の形にします。

questions.question: He asked, "Do you play games?" → He asked ___ I played games.
questions.explanation: Yes/No疑問文は if/whether を使います

questions.question: He asked, "What do you play?" → He asked ___ I played.
questions.explanation: 疑問詞のある疑問文はそのまま疑問詞を使います

questions.question: He asked, "Where do you play?" → He asked ___ I played.
questions.explanation: 疑問詞のある疑問文はそのまま疑問詞を使います

questions.question: She asked, "Are you happy?" → She asked ___ I was happy.
questions.explanation: Yes/No疑問文は if/whether を使います

questions.question: He asked, "When will you come?" → He asked ___ I would come.
questions.explanation: 疑問詞のある疑問文はそのまま疑問詞を使います

questions.question: She asked, "Why are you late?" → She asked ___ I was late.
questions.explanation: 疑問詞のある疑問文はそのまま疑問詞を使います

questions.question: He asked, "Can you help me?" → He asked ___ I could help him.
questions.explanation: Yes/No疑問文は if/whether を使います

questions.question: 間接疑問文の語順は？
questions.explanation: 間接疑問文では平叙文の語順（主語+動詞）になります
